![Black background with the white stylized initials R R R](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/645aeb6e5e03ca278fcc244b/d51f7460-32c1-4175-891d-deedd299a317/Rich+and+Rare_RR+Logo_RGB_White.png)

![A circular badge with a blue watercolor background, displaying the text 'Winner Awards for Excellence 2025' in white, with 'Winner' written in script font.](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/645aeb6e5e03ca278fcc244b/19f3cb37-cf2c-46fe-bcc7-e309fcf78111/R%26R_Winner.png)

![Bronze Awards for Excellence 2025 plaque](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/645aeb6e5e03ca278fcc244b/43db72df-198f-49ae-9f24-bbaa214cfe7b/bronze-award.png)

Rich flavours. Rare cuts. Real service.

# STEAK AND SEAFOOD RESTAURANT, WEST VILLAGE

[BOOK NOW](https://www.sevenrooms.com/explore/richandrarerestaurant/reservations/create/search?venues=richandrarerestaurant,pompetteau,darkshepherd,yamasgreekdrink,stilts,fatcowrestaurant,longwangchopstickhouse,opabarmezze,massimorestaurantandbar,foshbarrestaurant)

[BOOK NOW](https://www.sevenrooms.com/explore/richandrarerestaurant/reservations/create/search?venues=richandrarerestaurant,pompetteau,darkshepherd,yamasgreekdrink,stilts,fatcowrestaurant,longwangchopstickhouse,opabarmezze,massimorestaurantandbar,foshbarrestaurant)

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/645aeb6e5e03ca278fcc244b/a0fba70f-ea90-45c7-ad8c-cba7128b6dc7/Rich-and-Rare_Web-Page-design_V2.jpg)

Rich & Rare offers premium fare without pretension. Open your collar, order a whisky and settle in to enjoy succulent, dry-aged steak and freshly caught seafood, nestled in the heart of Brisbane’s vibrant West Village precinct.

[VIEW MENU](https://www.richandrare.com.au/menus)

[VIEW MENU](https://www.richandrare.com.au/menus)

![Person squeezing lemon over a seafood dish with lobster, fish, and shellfish, with glasses of white wine on a marble table.](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/645aeb6e5e03ca278fcc244b/44aafd22-89c7-4aaf-a014-2ab3118bf0d8/Rich+%26+Rare+-+Markus+Ravik+-+110.jpg)

![A dinner plate with a cooked steak topped with brown gravy, a small green pitcher, a salad in a white bowl, a white dish with cooked stuffed chicken breasts, and a glass of red wine on a marble table.](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/645aeb6e5e03ca278fcc244b/c0f8bdcb-ef49-4410-a672-b2de1a3e09d0/Rich+%26+Rare+-+Markus+Ravik+-+132.jpg)

![Oysters on the half shell with green garnish and orange roe, served on a bed of ice on a white platter.](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/645aeb6e5e03ca278fcc244b/f46729bb-c405-4c20-8895-1a8f616256fa/Rich+%26+Rare+-+Markus+Ravik+-+077.jpg)

Business or pleasure - delight your guests with the casual sophistication of Rich & Rare. From an exclusive 10-seater private room, to command of the whole venue, our spaces can work to your needs.

[CONTACT US](https://www.richandrare.com.au/contact)

[CONTACT US](https://www.richandrare.com.au/contact)

![Glass of red wine and a plate of sliced cured ham with herbs on a black outdoor table.](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/645aeb6e5e03ca278fcc244b/e9c2b80c-f97e-4dff-81a4-2e7aef6e23c6/Rich+%26+Rare+-+Markus+Ravik+-+054.jpg)

![Five small white bowls with different gourmet dishes are arranged on a white marble dining table.](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/645aeb6e5e03ca278fcc244b/375aaf5d-f714-4593-8953-493fe215c42d/Rich+%26+Rare+-+Markus+Ravik+-+138.jpg)

![Black pasta with fried toppings on a white plate beside a glass of white wine on a dark table.](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/645aeb6e5e03ca278fcc244b/e8e9f3c1-6b39-4a46-9bd7-840c1d488039/Rich+%26+Rare+-+Markus+Ravik+-+145.jpg)

![A plate of seared scallops with broccoli and crunchy topping on a black plate, a glass of white wine, and a set of fork, knife, and napkin on a white marble table.](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/645aeb6e5e03ca278fcc244b/6d1c5350-0fb5-4b3c-83d1-c1363f13efd5/Rich+%26+Rare+-+Markus+Ravik+-+105.jpg)

![Fine dining plate with crab legs, purple edible flowers, a yellow sauce, and lemon, with a glass of white wine and a set of silverware on a marble table.](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/645aeb6e5e03ca278fcc244b/46477aef-c229-4e4a-b028-41364c7234f3/Rich+%26+Rare+-+Markus+Ravik+-+106.jpg)

![A formal dining table set with wine glasses, water glasses, plates, napkins, forks, knives, and spoons in front of a dark wood paneled wall with two circular light fixtures.](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/645aeb6e5e03ca278fcc244b/27373d68-0489-45bd-acdd-e5d434fce859/Rich+%26+Rare+-+Markus+Ravik+-+170.jpg)

# MOTHER'S DAY DINING

Because Mum deserves a day as special as she is!

**Sunday 10th of May.**

- [BOOK NOW](https://www.sevenrooms.com/explore/richandrarerestaurant/reservations/create/search?date=2026-05-10&venues=richandrarerestaurant%2Cpompetteau%2Cdarkshepherd%2Cyamasgreekdrink%2Cstilts%2Cfatcowrestaurant%2Clongwangchopstickhouse%2Copabarmezze%2Cmassimorestaurantandbar%2Cfoshbarrestaurant)

metadata.description: Stunning steak and seafood restaurant in Brisbane's West Village precinct, in West End. Join us for an array of gourmet steak, fresh seafood, an extensive wine list and cocktails., Stunning steak and seafood restaurant in Brisbane's West Village precinct, in West End.
